revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset sheet.

Canvas / sheet contract:
- Exact sheet size: 128x96 pixels.
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column, one frame only, frame size 128x96 pixels.
- Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background filling every empty pixel; absolutely no gradients or transparency.
- No cell separator lines, grid lines, borders, frame numbers, labels, UI, signatures, watermarks, or text.
- Leave a clear solid magenta margin between the house and every canvas edge.
- No detached fragments, isolated dust pixels, seam slivers, leftover marks, or floating bits.

Asset:
- ONE Japanese village wooden house as a single coherent field-prop object, not repeated small tile stamps.
- SFC / SNES 16-bit style pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, fine readable pixel clusters, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left light source.
- Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: muted matcha and moss greens, warm wood tones, vermilion-and-white accents, cheerful and readable.
- Strict flat front elevation view: viewed perfectly straight-on from the front like a facade, fully face-on and symmetrical, no perspective, no three-quarter angle, no visible side walls.
- Distinct from a thatched farmhouse: use a dark tiled kawara roof, seen straight-on, with clear tile rows and ridge detail.
- Break the rectangular box silhouette with roof overhangs, uneven eaves, chimney, trim, small asymmetrical readable props, and grounding/contact shadow, while preserving a clean collision footprint.
- Fills most of the 128x96 canvas while keeping margin.

House details:
- Dark kawara tiled roof, broad overhang, subtle two-tone tile highlights from top-left.
- Two-tone wooden front wall with varied wood texture and small dirt/shadow clusters.
- Centered wooden sliding entrance tall enough for a person.
- Small noren curtain over the doorway, no characters or letters on it.
- Paper lantern hanging beside the entrance, with no text or symbols.
- Stone step at the centered doorway.
- Vermilion cord charm beside the door.
- Small windows and trim on the flat facade only.
- Soft contact shadow along the base.

Originality / exclusions:
- Original generic fantasy village house only; no recognizable characters, logos, mascots, letter emblems, franchise likenesses, modern objects, samurai armor, kabuto helmets, ninja outfits, two-sword sets, guns, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, pets, or companion creatures.

Output appearance:
- Crisp high-resolution presentation of a 128x96 pixel-art PNG asset with hard square pixels, solid #FF00FF background, no text, one authored coherent building.
